description_long: This is a modern, two-story residential house with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The front features a white facade, a small porch with steps, and a fenced yard with a prominent tree. The rear of the house opens to a spacious backyard with a swimming pool, patio seating, and a grassy play area with palm trees and a swing set. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically across the exterior, providing ample natural light to the interior spaces. The side views reveal additional landscaping, including shrubs and a garden area, as well as a garage entrance. The overall aesthetic is minimalist, with a focus on open outdoor living spaces and functional, contemporary architecture.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, white facade, large windows, and a backyard featuring a pool and play area. The design emphasizes clean lines, open outdoor spaces, and minimalist landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, porch, white fence, and a large tree in the front yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage entrance, side garden, and a glimpse of the backyard pool and play area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard with a swimming pool, patio seating, grassy area, palm trees, and a swing set.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing additional windows, landscaping, and the overall rectangular structure of the house.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a single door, small porch, steps, and a white fence; minimal decorative elements.
